title: Suture removal documentation

assessment.text: Defines the postoperative surgical-wound population and supports wound dressing, cleansing, wound-healing, and structured postoperative wound-care documentation.
assessment.rationale: Relevant to clinician-recorded surgical wound and healing context but not to deciding or performing suture removal.
assessment.evidence_extract: Defines the postoperative surgical-wound population and supports wound dressing, cleansing, wound-healing, and structured postoperative wound-care documentation.

source.title: Surgical site infections: prevention and treatment — Recommendations

follow_up.text: Supports review of suspected infection, cellulitis, microbiology context, structured wound care, and local heat, redness, pain, swelling, discharge, separation, abscess, fever, or systemic signs.
follow_up.rationale: Relevant to documented local or systemic concern features when assessed without diagnosing infection or selecting action.
follow_up.evidence_extract: Supports review of suspected infection, cellulitis, microbiology context, structured wound care, and local heat, redness, pain, swelling, discharge, separation, abscess, fever, or systemic signs.

source_limitations: All item-level mappings remain unsupported pending separate clinician review and signed approval.
Procedure, wound site, closure date, material, planned timing, healing, infection, dehiscence, examination and consent are absent.
No timing, readiness, removal, procedure result, dressing, antibiotic or referral is generated.
curation_policy: Direct guideline curation: retain only explicitly mapped content; rewrite only with explicit item mapping; remove unmapped legacy content; add only committed exact-section evidence summaries.
